title: calcearia puberula
intro: Calcearia puberula, also known as Cystopteris puberula, is a species of fern in the family Cystopteridaceae, commonly found in North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various flavonoids and saponins. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Calcearia puberula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and to alleviate various health issues.
